lessons.name: Unit 5: Our Experiences
lessons.description: Learn about experiences with present perfect tense.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Experiences: experience, adventure, journey, trip, travel, visit, explore, discover, try, taste, enjoy

Activities: climb, hike, camp, swim, dive, surf, ski, skydive, bungee jump, ride, drive

Places: mountain, beach, forest, desert, island, cave, waterfall, temple, museum, market

Feelings: exciting, amazing, wonderful, fantastic, incredible, unforgettable, memorable, scary, challenging, rewarding

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about travel experiences, adventures, and memorable moments.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Present Perfect Tense (Thì hiện tại hoàn thành)

A. Cấu trúc:

  • Khẳng định: S + have/has + V3/ed
  • Ex: I have visited Paris.
  • Ex: She has eaten sushi.
  • Phủ định: S + have/has + not + V3/ed
  • Ex: I haven't been to Japan.
  • Nghi vấn: Have/Has + S + V3/ed?
  • Ex: Have you ever tried skydiving?

B. Cách dùng:

  • 1. Kinh nghiệm, trải nghiệm (đã từng)
  • Ex: I have been to London. (Tôi đã từng đến London)
  • Ex: She has never eaten Thai food.
  • 2. Hành động vừa mới xảy ra
  • Ex: I have just finished my homework.
  • 3. Hành động bắt đầu trong quá khứ, kéo dài đến hiện tại
  • Ex: I have lived here for 5 years.
  • 4. Hành động đã hoàn thành, nhưng thời gian chưa kết thúc
  • Ex: I have read 3 books this month.

C. Dấu hiệu nhận biết:

  • ever (đã từng) - dùng trong câu hỏi
  • Ex: Have you ever been to Paris?
  • never (chưa bao giờ) - dùng trong câu phủ định
  • Ex: I have never seen a ghost.
  • just (vừa mới)
  • Ex: I have just arrived.
  • already (đã...rồi)
  • Ex: I have already done it.
  • yet (chưa) - dùng cuối câu phủ định/nghi vấn
  • Ex: I haven't finished yet.
  • for + khoảng thời gian (for 3 years)
  • since + mốc thời gian (since 2020)
  • so far, up to now, recently, lately

D. So sánh Present Perfect vs Past Simple:

  • Present Perfect: Không có thời gian cụ thể
  • Ex: I have visited Paris. (không rõ khi nào)
  • Past Simple: Có thời gian cụ thể
  • Ex: I visited Paris last year. (thời gian cụ thể)

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Present Perfect - Kinh nghiệm với Ever/Never
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Have/Has + S + ever + V3?
  • S + have/has + never + V3
  • Diễn tả kinh nghiệm

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Present Perfect với Just/Already/Yet
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • just: vừa mới (giữa have/has và V3)
  • already: đã...rồi (giữa have/has và V3)
  • yet: chưa (cuối câu phủ định/nghi vấn)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Present Perfect với For/Since
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • for + khoảng thời gian (for 3 years)
  • since + mốc thời gian (since 2020)
  • Hành động kéo dài đến hiện tại

examples.question: I ______ (live) here for 5 years.
examples.explanation: have + V3 + for + khoảng thời gian

examples.question: She ______ (work) here since 2020.
examples.explanation: has + V3 + since + mốc thời gian

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Present Perfect vs Past Simple
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Present Perfect: không có thời gian cụ thể
  • Past Simple: có thời gian cụ thể (yesterday, last year, ago)

examples.question: I ______ (visit) Paris. (không rõ khi nào)
examples.explanation: Không có thời gian cụ thể → present perfect

examples.question: I ______ (visit) Paris last year. (thời gian cụ thể)
examples.explanation: Có thời gian cụ thể (last year) → past simple

examples.question: She ______ (eat) sushi before. / She ______ (eat) sushi yesterday.
examples.solution: She has eaten sushi before. / She ate sushi yesterday.
examples.explanation: before (không cụ thể) → present perfect; yesterday (cụ thể) → past simple

exercises.question: ______ you ever been to Paris?
exercises.explanation: Have + ever + V3 (kinh nghiệm)

exercises.question: I ______ never eaten sushi.
exercises.explanation: have + never + V3

exercises.question: She ______ never seen the ocean.
exercises.explanation: has + never + V3

exercises.question: I have ______ finished my homework.
exercises.explanation: just = vừa mới (giữa have và V3)

exercises.question: She has ______ left.
exercises.explanation: already = đã...rồi

exercises.question: I haven't finished ______.
exercises.explanation: yet = chưa (cuối câu phủ định)

exercises.question: I ______ here for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: have + V3 + for + khoảng thời gian

exercises.question: She ______ here since 2020.
exercises.explanation: has + V3 + since + mốc thời gian

exercises.question: I ______ Paris. (không rõ khi nào)
exercises.explanation: Không có thời gian cụ thể → present perfect

exercises.question: I ______ Paris last year.
exercises.explanation: Có thời gian cụ thể (last year) → past simple

exercises.question: Which sentences use present perfect correctly? (Select all that apply)
options: They have lived here for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: have visited, has never eaten, have lived for. Sai: have visited yesterday (phải dùng past simple với 'yesterday')

exercises.question: Which words are used with present perfect? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: ever, never, just. Sai: yesterday (dùng với past simple)

exercises.question: Which indicate duration with present perfect? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: for + khoảng thời gian, since + mốc thời gian. Sai: yesterday, ago (dùng với past simple)

exercises.question: Fill in: ______ you ever ______ (be) to Paris?
exercises.explanation: Have + ever + V3

exercises.question: Fill in: I ______ just ______ (finish) my homework.
exercises.explanation: have + just + V3

exercises.question: Fill in: I ______ (live) here ______ 5 years.
exercises.explanation: have + V3 + for + khoảng thời gian

exercises.question: Fill in: She ______ (work) here ______ 2020.
exercises.explanation: has + V3 + since + mốc thời gian

exercises.question: Rearrange: you / Have / ever / been / to / Paris / ? / never / I / have / eaten / sushi / .
exercises.sample_answer: Have you ever been to Paris? I have never eaten sushi.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: Have + S + ever + V3? S + have + never + V3.

exercises.question: Transform: I went to Paris. (không rõ khi nào) → I ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I have been to Paris. / I have visited Paris.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Không có thời gian cụ thể → present perfect

exercises.question: Transform: I started living here 5 years ago. I still live here. → I ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I have lived here for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Hành động kéo dài đến hiện tại → present perfect + for

exercises.question: Rearrange: just / I / have / finished / homework / my / . / lived / have / I / here / for / 5 years / .
exercises.sample_answer: I have just finished my homework. I have lived here for 5 years.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: have + just + V3; have + V3 + for

exercises.question: Transform and compare: I visited Paris. (last year) vs I visited Paris. (không rõ khi nào) - Rewrite both sentences correctly
exercises.sample_answer: I visited Paris last year. (Past Simple) I have visited Paris. (Present Perfect)
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Có thời gian cụ thể → past simple; Không có thời gian cụ thể → present perfect
